Fields

FROUND_CEIL = 2
FROUND_CEIL_NOEXC = FROUND_CEIL | FROUND_NINT_NOEXC
FROUND_CUR_DIRECTION = 4
FROUND_FLOOR = 1
FROUND_FLOOR_NOEXC = FROUND_FLOOR | FROUND_NINT_NOEXC
FROUND_NEARBYINT = FROUND_CUR_DIRECTION | FROUND_NINT_NOEXC
FROUND_NINT = 0
FROUND_NINT_NOEXC = 8
FROUND_NO_EXC = 8
FROUND_RAISE_EXC = 0
FROUND_RINT = 4
FROUND_RINT_NOEXC = FROUND_CUR_DIRECTION | FROUND_NINT_NOEXC
FROUND_TO_NEAREST_INT = 0
FROUND_TO_NEG_INF = 1
FROUND_TO_POS_INF = 2
FROUND_TO_ZERO = FROUND_FLOOR | FROUND_CEIL
FROUND_TRUNC = FROUND_FLOOR | FROUND_CEIL
FROUND_TRUNC_NOEXC = FROUND_FLOOR | FROUND_CEIL_NOEXC
